title: Safe Pets
description: This mod prohibits the player from harming tamed animals.
body:
# 🛡️ Safe Pets
### Never accidentally hurt your furry friends again!
----
We've all been there. You're fighting a zombie in a dark cave, your loyal dog jumps in to help, and bam... your sword sweeps and hits your own pet. The guilt is unbearable.

Safe Pets is a simple, lightweight Quality of Life (QoL) mod that **completely disables "friendly fire" for your tamed animals**. If you are the owner of the pet, your attacks will simply be canceled without dealing any damage to them.

-------

### Features:
### 
**Protects all your tamed and owned animals from your own attacks, including:**

- Wolves (Dogs)
- Cats
- Parrots
- Horses, Donkeys, and Mules
- Llamas

## ⚠️ Important Notes:

Only protects against YOU: This mod only stops the owner from hurting their pets. Monsters, lava, fall damage, and other players can still hurt them. Keep them safe!

### Cross-platform: Built with [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api/versions?g=1.20.1). 
Available for both Forge and Fabric.

Multiplayer: If you are playing on a server, this mod needs to be installed on the server for the damage cancellation to work.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks!
